title: zantedeschia albomaculata
intro: Zantedeschia albomaculata, also known as the arum lily or white arum lily, is a flowering plant native to southern Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Zantedeschia albomaculata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions, and treat respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
